prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This guidance specifically addresses upland breeding wader surveys and woodland creation within upland farmland and moorland in northern England. It outlines practices and regulations that pertain directly to land management in England, indicating its applicability solely to this nation.
